title: Inkathi Yenuzi Nempi Ebandayo
subject: History
caps_topic: The Nuclear Age and the Cold War

sources.title: Grade 9 - Term 2: The Nuclear Age and the Cold War
Hiroshima is targeted by a WWII atomic bomb
USA drops atomic bomb on Nagasaki
Winston Churchill announces that Britain has produced its own atomic bomb
Western countries, including South Africa, implement an airlift to supply provisions to the inhabitants of the eastern section of Berlin
Banishment under the Suppression of Communism Act of 1950
The United Nations and Apartheid Timeline 1946-1994

slides.title: Inkathi Yenuzi Nempi Ebandayo
slides.lead: Indlela isikhali esisha esesabekayo kanye nombango phakathi kwamazwe amabili anamandla amakhulu (superpowers) akubumba ngayo umhlaba - kwaze kwafinyelela naseNingizimu Afrika.

media.alt: Umhlaba ohlukaniswe waba izingxenye ezimbili - enye ebomvu, enye eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka - kunefu elimise okwesikhowe likhuphuka ngemuva kwawo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#0e1b2a'/><path d='M120 40 q40 -30 80 0 q10 40 0 70 q-40 30 -80 0 q-10 -40 0 -70 Z' fill='#c9a94a' opacity='0.35'/><circle cx='160' cy='118' r='42' fill='#1f5b8a'/><path d='M160 76 a42 42 0 0 1 0 84 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><line x1='160' y1='72' x2='160' y2='164' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='160' cy='60' rx='26' ry='16' fill='#c9a94a' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='20' height='18' fill='#c9a94a' opacity='0.8'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi igama elithi 'nuzi' (nuclear) libenza bacabange ngani. Chaza imibono emikhulu emibili yalesi sifundo: (1) 'Inkathi Yenuzi' - umhlaba emva kokuba izikhali zenuzi zisetshenziswe okokuqala ngo-1945, kanye (2) 'iMpi Ebandayo' - umbango omude phakathi kwe-United States neSoviet Union owawungakaze ube yimpi eqondile 'eshisayo' phakathi kwawo, kodwa owabumba cishe zonke izingxenye zomhlaba, kuhlanganisa ne-Afrika neNingizimu Afrika.

slides.title: Umhlaba omusha emva kuka-1945
slides.lead: IMpi Yezwe Yesibili yaphela ngo-1945 - kwasala amazwe amabili 'anamandla amakhulu' (superpowers) emile.

blocks.text: Ngesikhathi iMpi Yezwe Yesibili iphela ngo-1945, iningi laseYurophu laliyincithakalo. Amazwe amabili ayeseqhamuka enamandla adlula wonke amanye: i-**United States of America (USA)** kanye ne-**Union of Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR, noma iSoviet Union)**. Siwabiza ngokuthi ngamazwe **anamandla amakhulu (superpowers)**.

items: Ayebambisene ekulweni neJalimane likaNazi, kodwa ayengathembani.
Ayekholelwa ezindleleni eziphambene zokuphatha izwe nomnotho.
Izinhlangano ezintsha ezinjenge-United Nations / iZizwe Ezihlangene (1945) zazama ukugcina ukuthula.

slides.notes: Gcizelela into engajwayelekile: i-USA ne-USSR zawuwina impi zibambisene, base ngokushesha baba yizimbangi. Chaza igama elithi 'inamandla amakhulu' (superpower) - izwe elinamandla amakhulu kangaka empini nasemnothweni kangangokuthi izinqumo zalo zithinta umhlaba wonke. Sho ngezinhlangano ezinjenge-United Nations, lapho iNingizimu Afrika yayingelinye lamazwe asungula, njengesizinda esisha lapho le mibango yayivame ukuxoxwa khona.

slides.title: IHiroshima neNagasaki
slides.lead: Okokuqala nokokugcina empini, kwaphonswa amabhomu enuzi emadolobheni amabili.

blocks.text: Ngo-**6 Agasti 1945** i-USA yaphonsa ibhomu lenuzi edolobheni laseJapane elibizwa nge-**Hiroshima**. Ezinsukwini ezintathu kamuva, ngo-**9 Agasti 1945**, ibhomu lesibili labhubhisa i-**Nagasaki**. IJapane yazinikela ngokushesha emva kwalokho, yaphetha iMpi Yezwe Yesibili.

items: Ibhomu elilodwa lalikwazi ukubhubhisa idolobha lonke ngemizuzwana embalwa.
Ngasekupheleni kuka-1945, kulinganiselwa ukuthi abantu abangu-140 000 eHiroshima nabangu-74 000 eNagasaki babe sebefile ngenxa yokuqhuma, ukushisa nemisebe (radiation).
Umhlaba wase ungenile 'eNkathini Yenuzi' - kanti manje namanye amazwe ase encintisana ukwakha awawo amabhomu.

media.alt: Ifu elimise okwesikhowe likhuphuka phezu kwedolobha eselibhidlikile.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 170' role='img'><rect width='220' height='170' fill='#0e1b2a'/><rect y='138' width='220' height='32' fill='#3a3a3a'/><g fill='#555'><rect x='16' y='124' width='16' height='14'/><rect x='40' y='118' width='14' height='20'/><rect x='176' y='122' width='16' height='16'/><rect x='196' y='128' width='12' height='10'/></g><ellipse cx='110' cy='46' rx='40' ry='26' fill='#e6b84a'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='40' rx='26' ry='16' fill='#f0d38a'/><rect x='98' y='60' width='24' height='58' fill='#e6b84a'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='122' rx='30' ry='12' fill='#c98a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha lesi silayidi ngokucophelela nangozwelo - laba kwakungabantu bangempela. Izibalo yizilinganiso ezicashunwa kabanzi; izinombolo eziqondile azaziwa ngokugcwele ngenxa yobukhulu bencithakalo nokufa okwenzeka kamuva ngenxa yemisebe. Chaza 'imisebe (radiation)' kalula: ubuthi obungabonakali obakhishwa yibhomu obuqhubeka bubulala futhi bugulisa abantu iminyaka. Yenza uxhumano oluya phambili: amandla amakhulu ala mabhomu yiwo enza iMpi Ebandayo yaba yingozi kangaka.

slides.title: Imvelaphi yeMpi Ebandayo
slides.lead: Impi yokwesaba, yezinsongo neyokuncintisana - hhayi ukulwa okuqondile phakathi kwamazwe anamandla amakhulu.

blocks.text: I-**Mpi Ebandayo** (cishe ngo-1945 kuya ku-1991) kwakuwumbango onzima phakathi kwe-USA ne-USSR. Yayibizwa ngokuthi 'ebandayo' ngoba la mazwe amabili anamandla amakhulu awakaze alwe ngokuqondile - impi eqondile yayingase ibhubhise umhlaba wonke ngezikhali zenuzi. Esikhundleni salokho ayencintisana ngokuhloleka (ubunhloli), **impaganda, ubumbano nomjaho wezikhali**.

items: IYurophu yahlukaniswa yaba iqembu laseNtshonalanga (eliholwa yi-USA) neqembu laseMpumalanga (eliholwa yi-USSR).
Ngo-1946 uWinston Churchill wathi 'iKhethini Lensimbi' laliwele phansi lehlukanisa iYurophu.
Uhlangothi ngalunye lwalizama ukusabalalisa izinkolelo zalo kwamanye amazwe emhlabeni.

media.alt: Imephu yaseYurophu ehlukaniswe phakathi yikhethini lensimbi elisindayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='20' width='96' height='120' fill='#1f5b8a' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='128' y='20' width='96' height='120' fill='#8a1f1f' opacity='0.7'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><rect x='115' y='14' width='10' height='132'/><rect x='113' y='14' width='14' height='6'/><rect x='113' y='24' width='14' height='6'/><rect x='113' y='34' width='14' height='6'/></g><text x='64' y='150' font-size='11' fill='#1f5b8a' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>West</text><text x='176' y='150' font-size='11' fill='#8a1f1f' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>East</text></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza 'iqembu (bloc)' - iqembu lamazwe akuhlangothi olulodwa. Chaza 'iKhethini Lensimbi' njengomugqa ongubuqiniso, hhayi udonga langempela, ohlukanisa amazwentando yeningi anomnotho wemakethe ekhululekile aseNtshonalanga Yurophu namazwe obukhomanisi ayelawulwa iSoviet aseMpumalanga Yurophu. Gcizelela into ephikisanayo esemqoka: ukwesaba ukubhujiswa okuphelele kwenuzi yikhona kanye okwavimbela impi ukuba ingaphenduki 'eshisayo' phakathi kwala mazwe amabili anamandla amakhulu.

slides.title: I-Capitalism ngokumelene ne-Communism
slides.lead: Enhliziyweni yeMpi Ebandayo kwakunemibono emibili ehluke kakhulu mayelana nendlela izwe okumele liphathwe ngayo.

items: Amabhizinisi nempahla kuvame ukuba semikhonweni yabantu ngabanye.
Amanani namaholo abekwa yimakethe.
Kuvame ukuxhumana nentando yeningi yamaqembu amaningi nokhetho.
Iholwa yi-USA.
Umbuso uphethe imboni, umhlaba nempahla 'egameni labantu'.
Uhulumeni uhlela umnotho.
Kuvame ukubuswa yiqembu elilodwa leCommunist Party.
Iholwa yi-USSR.

slides.notes: Gcina lokhu kulinganisela futhi kunobuqiniso, hhayi ukwahlulela - iphuzu ukuthi uhlangothi ngalunye lwalukholelwa ukuthi uhlelo lwalo lungcono futhi lwesaba ukuthi olunye luzosabalala. Qaphela ukuthi empeleni akukho hlangothi olwaluhlala luphila ngokuhambisana nezimiso zalo. Lokhu kungqubuzana kwemibono (ubuzimela/ideology) kuchaza UKUTHI KUNGANI umbango wawuzwakala uphelele kangaka: kwakuyimpi ngendlela umhlaba wonke okumele uhleleke ngayo.

slides.title: Amakamu amabili ahlomile
slides.lead: Womabili amazwe anamandla amakhulu akha ubumbano lwezempi ukuvikela iqembu lawo.

blocks.heading: NATO, 1949
blocks.text: I-North Atlantic Treaty Organisation - i-USA namazwe ayo aseNtshonalanga bethembisana ukuvikelana.

blocks.heading: Warsaw Pact, 1955
blocks.text: I-USSR namazwe ayo aseMpumalanga Yurophu bakha ubumbano lwabo lwezempi njengempendulo.

blocks.heading: Umhlaba wonke uyabuka
blocks.text: Amazwe kuyo yonke indawo ayecindezelwa ukuba akhethe uhlangothi - noma azame ukuhlala 'engathathi hlangothi'.

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi ubumbano lusho ukuthi ukuhlaselwa kwelungu elilodwa kubalwa njengokuhlaselwa kwawo wonke. I-NATO yaqala kuqala (1949); i-Warsaw Pact kwaba yimpendulo yeSoviet (1955). Ethula 'ongathathi hlangothi' - amazwe amaningi asanda kuzimela, ikakhulukazi e-Afrika nase-Asia, azama ukungajoyini noluphi uhlangothi. Lokhu kubeka isisekelo sezilayidi ezizayo mayelana ne-Afrika.

slides.title: Idolobha elihlukanisiwe: iBerlin
slides.lead: Idolobha laseJalimane iBerlin laba enye yezindawo eziyingozi kakhulu ngesikhathi seMpi Ebandayo.

blocks.text: Emva kwempi, iJalimane nenhloko-dolobha yalo iBerlin kwahlukaniswa phakathi kwamazwe anamandla amakhulu. Ngo-**1948-1949** i-USSR yavimbezela iWest Berlin, yavala ukudla nophethiloli. INtshonalanga yaphendula nge-**Berlin Airlift**, indiza yaletha impahla emini nasebusuku - futhi abashayeli bezindiza baseNingizimu Afrika babamba iqhaza kule airlift.

items: Ngo-1961 iMpumalanga yakha u-**Donga LwaseBerlin (Berlin Wall)** ukuvimba abantu ukuba babalekele eNtshonalanga.
Lolu Donga lwaba yisibonakaliso esidume kakhulu somhlaba ohlukanisiwe.
Ngesikhathi uDonga luwa ngo-1989, kwakukhombisa ukuthi iMpi Ebandayo isiphela.

media.alt: Udonga olude lukasimende oluqhelwe ucingo olunameva phezulu oluhlukanisa amacala amabili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#cddbe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='100' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#c8c2b6'/><rect x='100' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#8a8477' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'><path d='M100 26 l40 0'/><path d='M104 20 l8 8 M112 20 l8 8 M120 20 l8 8 M128 20 l8 8'/></g><line x1='108' y1='42' x2='108' y2='130' stroke='#8a8477' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='120' y1='42' x2='120' y2='130' stroke='#8a8477' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='132' y1='42' x2='132' y2='130' stroke='#8a8477' stroke-width='1'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa uxhumano lwasekhaya - abashayeli bezindiza be-South African Air Force bandiza ku-Berlin Airlift - ukukhombisa abafundi ukuthi ngisho iNingizimu Afrika ekude yayibandakanyekile. Landelela umlando woDonga: lwakhiwa ngo-1961 ukuvimbela abantu eMpumalanga, lwadilizwa ngo-1989 njengoba iMpi Ebandayo iwohloka. UDonga luyisibonakaliso sikasimende esiphelele sombono 'weKhethini Lensimbi' esisuka esilayidini 4.

slides.title: Umjaho wezikhali nomjaho womkhathi
slides.lead: Womabili amacala akha izikhali ezinamandla amakhulu ngokwengeziwe - ezanele ukubhubhisa umhlaba izikhathi eziningi.

blocks.text: Ku-**mjaho wezikhali** izwe ngalinye elinamandla amakhulu lalizama ukwakha izikhali eziningi neziyingozi kakhulu kunelinye, kuhlanganisa ne-**bhomu le-hydrogen** elinamandla amakhulu nakakhulu. Lokhu kwadala ibhalansi eyethusayo eyayibizwa ngezinye izikhathi ngokuthi 'ukubhujiswa okuqinisekisiwe komabili amacala' (mutually assured destruction) - uma uhlangothi olulodwa luhlasela, omabili ayezobhubha.

items: Ngeminyaka yawo-1960 womabili amacala ayeseneminingi imicibisholo yenuzi.
Umbango wasabalala nasemkhathini: i-USSR yethula i-**Sputnik**, isathelayithi yokuqala, ngo-1957.
Izingane zesikole kwamanye amazwe zazizilolonga 'ukucathama nokuzifihla' (duck and cover) uma kungenzeka kube nokuhlaselwa kwenuzi.

media.alt: Imicibisholo emibili ekhomba omunye komunye kunesikali sokulinganisa phakathi kwayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#0e1b2a'/><g fill='#1f5b8a'><path d='M30 40 l0 60 l-10 14 l0 8 l30 0 l0 -8 l-10 -14 l0 -60 q-5 -14 0 -20 q5 6 0 20 Z'/></g><g fill='#8a1f1f'><path d='M210 40 l0 60 l-10 14 l0 8 l30 0 l0 -8 l-10 -14 l0 -60 q-5 -14 0 -20 q5 6 0 20 Z' transform='translate(-20,0)'/></g><line x1='120' y1='30' x2='120' y2='120' stroke='#c9a94a' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='90' y1='60' x2='150' y2='60' stroke='#c9a94a' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='90' cy='60' r='8' fill='none' stroke='#c9a94a' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8' fill='none' stroke='#c9a94a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza 'ukubhujiswa okuqinisekisiwe komabili amacala' (MAD) ngendlela elula: akukho hlangothi olwalulokotha luhlasela kuqala ngoba nalo lwaluzobhujiswa. Le 'bhalansi yokwesaba' yagcina ukuthula okungazinzile. Xhumanisa umjaho wezikhali nomjaho womkhathi - i-Sputnik (1957) yayethusa i-USA yayidudula ukuba ifinyelele eNyangeni ngo-1969. Iphuzu 'lokucathama nokuzifihla' lisiza abafundi bezwe indlela abantu abavamile ababephila ngayo nokwesaba kwenuzi.

slides.title: INkinga Yemicibisholo YaseCuba
slides.lead: Izinsuku eziyishumi nantathu ngo-1962 umhlaba wasondela empini yenuzi ngendlela ongazange asondele ngayo ngaphambili.

blocks.text: Ngo-1962 i-USSR yaqala ukubeka imicibisholo yenuzi esiqhingini sase-**Cuba**, eduze nje nogu lwe-USA. UMongameli wase-USA u-**John F. Kennedy** wafuna ukuthi ikhishwe futhi wavimbezela isiqhingi. Izinsuku eziyishumi nantathu ezinzima umhlaba wabamba umoya.

items: Umholi weSoviet u-**Nikita Khrushchev** ekugcineni wavuma ukususa imicibisholo.
Ngokubuyisela, i-USA yavuma ngasese ukususa imicibisholo eTurkey nokungayihlaseli iCuba.
Le nkinga yakhombisa ukuthi iMpi Ebandayo yayingaphenduka kalula ibe yimpi yenuzi.

media.alt: Isiqhingi olwandle sinomcibisholo phezu kwaso nomkhumbi ovimbezela amanzi asizungezile.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#1f5b8a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='60' ry='24' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M118 96 l0 -34 l-6 8 l0 -12 l12 -14 l12 14 l0 12 l-6 -8 l0 34 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><rect x='24' y='118' width='40' height='10'/><rect x='40' y='108' width='10' height='10'/><rect x='176' y='118' width='40' height='10'/><rect x='192' y='108' width='10' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Beka isimo: iCuba iyilungu lobukhomanisi elingumngane we-USSR emnyango nje we-USA, ngakho imicibisholo yeSoviet lapho yayethusa i-USA. Sho amagama abaholi ababili - uKennedy (USA) noKhrushchev (USSR). Gcizelela ukuthi isivumelwano esaqeda le nkinga sasiwukuvumelana, hhayi ukunqoba uhlangothi olulodwa, nokuthi ezinye izingxenye (ukususa imicibisholo yase-USA eTurkey) zagcinwa ziyimfihlo. Lesi yisibonelo esisobala kakhulu sokuthi umjaho wezikhali wawusuyingozi kangakanani.

slides.title: IMpi Ebandayo ngokushesha, 1945-1991

blocks.alt: Uhla lwesikhathi lwezehlakalo ezibalulekile zeMpi Ebandayo kusuka ku-1945 kuya ku-1991.

events.label: Amabhomu enuzi aphonswa eHiroshima naseNagasaki; iMpi Yezwe Yesibili iyaphela
Ukuvimbezela nokuletha ngezindiza eBerlin (Berlin Blockade and Airlift) kuyaqala
I-NATO yakhiwa; i-USSR ihlola ibhomu layo lenuzi lokuqala
ISoviet Union iyahlakazeka; iMpi Ebandayo iyaphela

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi silayidi ukuqinisa ulwazi ngaphambi kokuphendukela e-Afrika. Cela abafundi ukuba babone iphethini: izikhathi zengozi enkulu (1948, 1962) zilandelwa ukuthula okungazinzile, bese kuba nokuphela okuncane kancane kusukela ngo-1989. Veza ukuthi iMpi Ebandayo yathatha cishe iminyaka engu-46 - inde kunesikhathi abazali beningi labafundi abaphile ngaso.

slides.title: Umncintiswano womhlaba wonke e-Afrika
slides.lead: Njengoba amazwe ase-Afrika ethola inkululeko, womabili amazwe anamandla amakhulu ancintisana ngobungane bawo.

blocks.text: Kusukela ngasekupheleni kwawo-1950 amakoloni amaningi ase-Afrika aba ngamazwe azimele. I-USA ne-USSR bobabili banikeza imali, izikhali nokwesekwa ukuze bawine la mazwe amasha ehlangothini lwabo. Ngezinye izikhathi lo mncintiswano wagqugquzela **izimpi zabammeli (proxy wars)** - izingxabano lapho amazwe anamandla amakhulu ayesekela amacala ahlukene endaweni esikhundleni sokulwa wodwa ngokuqondile.

items: Abaholi abaningi base-Afrika bajoyina i-**Non-Aligned Movement (iNhlangano Yamazwe Angathathi Hlangothi)**, benqaba ukukhetha uhlangothi.
Izimpi zombango zangaphakathi emazweni anjenge-**Angola** neMozambique zadonsela ngaphakathi amazwe eMpi Ebandayo.
Umbango weMpi Ebandayo wabumba usizo, ukuhweba nezingxabano kulo lonke izwekazi.

media.alt: Umdwebo wezwekazi lase-Afrika onomcibisholo oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka nomcibisholo obomvu ofinyelela kulo ovela emaceleni ahlukene.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M118 24 q22 4 24 22 q10 8 6 24 q8 14 -2 28 q2 18 -12 30 q-6 16 -14 6 q-10 2 -12 -12 q-14 -10 -12 -28 q-10 -14 0 -28 q0 -18 14 -26 q4 -18 18 -16 Z' fill='#9aa77f' stroke='#5f6b45' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M14 60 l40 12 l-8 6 l10 4 l-14 6' fill='none' stroke='#1f5b8a' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M226 100 l-40 -12 l8 -6 l-10 -4 l14 -6' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza 'impi yabammeli (proxy war)' ngokucacile - amazwe anamandla amakhulu ayelwa ngokungaqondile ngokuhlomisa nokuxhasa amaqembu endawo. Chaza 'iNhlangano Yamazwe Angathathi Hlangothi (Non-Aligned Movement)' - iqembu lamazwe, amaningi awo asanda kuzimela, akhetha ukungangeni noluphi iqembu. I-Angola yisibonelo esiyinhloko esiyodlulela esilayidini esizayo mayelana neNingizimu Afrika. Gcizelela ukuthi izinqumo ezenziwa eWashington naseMoscow zaziba nemiphumela yangempela, ngezinye izikhathi ebulalayo, kubantu base-Afrika abavamile.

slides.title: Ubandlululo neMpi Ebandayo
slides.lead: Uhulumeni wobandlululo wasebenzisa ukwesaba kweMpi Ebandayo ukuzivikela - futhi wadonsela iNingizimu Afrika empini yesifunda.

blocks.text: Uhulumeni wobandlululo waseNingizimu Afrika waziveza eNtshonalanga njengomngane oqinile **ophikisana nobukhomanisi (anti-communist)**. Wasebenzisa ukwesaba ubukhomanisi ukuthethelela ukucindezela abaphikisi - isibonelo ngo-**Suppression of Communism Act of 1950 (uMthetho Wokucindezela Ubukhomanisi ka-1950)**, owawubhalwe ngokubanzi kangangokuthi wawungathulisa cishe noma ubani owayegxeka ubandlululo.

items: Uhulumeni wabiza amaqhawe enkululeko amaningi 'ngamakhomanisi' ukuze awahlambalaze.
Amabutho aseNingizimu Afrika alwa e-Angola, lapho angqubuzana khona namabutho aseCuba ayesekela olunye uhlangothi.
Njengoba iMpi Ebandayo iphela cishe ngo-1989-1990, olunye ukwesekwa kwaseNtshonalanga kobandlululo kwehla, kwasiza ukuvula umnyango wezingxoxo.

media.alt: Ihawu elinegama elithi ukulwa nobukhomanisi, liphonsa isithunzi eside phezu kwemephu yeningizimu ye-Afrika.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 20 l46 16 l0 44 q0 40 -46 58 q-46 -18 -46 -58 l0 -44 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M120 20 l46 16 l0 44 q0 40 -46 58 Z' fill='#6f1717'/><line x1='96' y1='58' x2='144' y2='58' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='120' y1='40' x2='120' y2='96' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisilayidi esibalulekile sokuthi 'pho kusho ukuthini kithi?'. Imibono emikhulu emibili: (1) ngaphakathi, abaholi bobandlululo basebenzisa ukwesaba komhlaba wonke ubukhomanisi njengesizathu sokuvimbela, ukuboph nokuthulisa abaphikisi - xhumanisa emuva no-Suppression of Communism Act. (2) ngaphandle, iNingizimu Afrika yadonselwa engxabanweni yabammeli yeMpi Ebandayo e-Angola, yaze yalwa namabutho aseCuba. Veza kubafundi ukuthi ukubiza abaphikisi 'ngamakhomanisi' kwakuvame ukuba yisu lezepolitiki, hhayi incazelo eyiqiniso. [SME] Qinisekisa izinga lemininingwane elindelekile ngempi yase-Angola/Border War ebangeni 9, uhlole indlela okuvezwa ngayo ukushintsha kokwesekwa kwaseNtshonalanga cishe ngo-1990.

slides.title: Imibuzo yokubukeza
slides.lead: Sebenzisa lokho okufundile ukuphendula le mibuzo esesitayeleni se-CAPS.

blocks.text: Phendula ngemisho ephelele. Amamaki asezibhamu abonisa ukuthi kulindeleke imininingwane engakanani.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi kungani umbango phakathi kwe-USA ne-USSR wawubizwa ngokuthi yiMpi 'Ebandayo'.
Chaza indawo eyodwa yengozi yeMpi Ebandayo (iBerlin NOMA iCuba) uchaze ukuthi kungani yayiyingozi kangaka.
Chaza izindlela EZIMBILI iMpi Ebandayo eyathinta ngazo i-Afrika noma iNingizimu Afrika.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yekilasi. Ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela izitayela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nezokubhala isigaba: izimpendulo zamamaki angu-4 zidinga amaphuzu ambalwa acacile; impendulo yamamaki angu-6 idinga isigaba esifushane esinembangela nomphumela. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba basebenzise amagama abalulekile esifundo: izwe elinamandla amakhulu (superpower), ubuzimela (ideology), umjaho wezikhali, impi yabammeli (proxy war), ukulwa nobukhomanisi (anti-communism).

slides.title: Kungani iNkathi Yenuzi neMpi Ebandayo kusabalulekile
slides.lead: Umbango ongazange ube yimpi eqondile wawushintsha umhlaba wonke - kuhlanganisa nezwe lethu.

blocks.text: Amabhomu enuzi ka-1945 anika abantu amandla okuzibhubhisa, kanti iMpi Ebandayo eyalandela yahlukanisa umhlaba cishe iminyaka engamashumi amahlanu. Yaphela ngokuthula cishe ngo-**1989-1991** ngesikhathi uDonga LwaseBerlin luwa neSoviet Union ihlakazeka.

items: Izikhali zenuzi zisekhona, ngakho izinqumo zeNkathi Yenuzi zisenathi namuhla.
IMpi Ebandayo yabumba inkululeko, izimpi nezepolitiki kulo lonke i-Afrika.
ENingizimu Afrika, ukuphela kwayo kwasiza ukuvula indawo yokuqhubekela entandweni yeningi ngeminyaka yawo-1990.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela ezintanjeni ezimbili esilayidini 1: iNkathi Yenuzi neMpi Ebandayo. Gcizelela iphuzu elinethemba lokuthi iMpi Ebandayo yaphela ngaphandle kwenhlekelele yenuzi eyayesatshwa, futhi cishe ngokuthula. Xhuma nezimpilo zabafundi: iNingizimu Afrika yentando yeningi abayaziyo yakhula ngokwengxenye emhlabeni owawushintsha njengoba iMpi Ebandayo iphela. Lokhu kuxhuma phambili neyunithi yeBanga 9 iTheku 3 mayelana neziphetho ezisemqoka emlandweni waseNingizimu Afrika.
